source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2004-04-15: RBI keeps repo rate at 6.00%. Accommodative stance maintained amid growth recovery post-dotcom slowdown. Current rate: 6.0%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2004-10-26: Repo rate held at 6.00%. WPI inflation benign at 5.1%. Current rate: 6.0%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2005-04-26: RBI hikes repo rate by 25 bps to 6.25%. Rising credit growth (30%+) warrants tightening. Current rate: 6.25%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2006-01-24: Repo rate raised to 6.50%. Global commodity prices driving WPI pressure. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2006-06-08: Rate hike to 6.75%. Food inflation acceleration and credit growth concerns. Current rate: 6.75%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2006-07-25: Repo rate at 7.00%. Emergency mid-cycle hike due to liquidity tightening. Current rate: 7.0%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2006-10-31: Rate raised to 7.25%. Sustained tightening cycle continues. Current rate: 7.25%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2007-03-30: Repo rate at 7.50%. Inflation above 6%, credit growth still elevated. Current rate: 7.5%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2007-07-31: Rate hike to 7.75%. Global liquidity conditions tightening. Current rate: 7.75%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2008-06-11: Rate raised to 8.00% as CPI surges above 8%. Current rate: 8.0%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2008-07-29: Emergency 50 bps hike to 8.50%. CPI at 12.4%, WPI at 12.5%. Current rate: 8.5%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2008-10-20: RBI cuts repo rate by 50 bps to 8.00%. Global financial crisis, Lehman collapse. Current rate: 8.0%. Change: -50 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2008-11-03: Further cut to 7.50%. Emergency response to global credit freeze. Current rate: 7.5%. Change: -50 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2008-12-08: 100 bps cut to 6.50%. Synchronized global easing amid recession fears. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: -100 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2009-01-02: Repo rate slashed to 5.50%. Fiscal stimulus and monetary easing coordinated. Current rate: 5.5%. Change: -100 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2009-03-04: Further cut to 5.00%. Supporting credit flow and economic recovery. Current rate: 5.0%. Change: -50 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2010-03-19: First hike in recovery cycle to 5.25%. Growth momentum restored. Current rate: 5.25%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2010-04-20: Rate at 5.50%. WPI inflation re-emerging above comfort zone. Current rate: 5.5%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2010-07-27: Hike to 5.75%. Food prices driving headline inflation. Current rate: 5.75%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2010-09-16: Rate at 6.00%. Sustained tightening to anchor inflation expectations. Current rate: 6.0%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2011-05-03: Rate raised to 7.25% (multiple hikes condensed). CPI above 9%. Current rate: 7.25%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2011-07-26: Rate at 8.00%. Peak of tightening cycle, WPI at 9.7%. Current rate: 8.0%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2012-04-17: Rate held at 8.00%. Growth slowing but inflation sticky. Current rate: 8.0%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2013-03-19: Rate cut to 7.75%. Growth slowdown warrants support. Current rate: 7.75%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2013-05-03: Cut to 7.50%. Below 5% GDP growth pressuring RBI. Current rate: 7.5%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2013-09-04: Rate hiked back to 7.75%. INR depreciation and external sector stress. Current rate: 7.75%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2014-01-28: Rate raised to 8.00%. New governor Raghuram Rajan focuses on inflation targeting. Current rate: 8.0%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2015-01-15: Inter-meeting cut to 7.75%. Inflation declining, oil price fall. Current rate: 7.75%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2015-03-04: Cut to 7.50%. CPI below 6%, growth support needed. Current rate: 7.5%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2015-06-02: Rate at 7.25%. Gradual easing as FMIT framework approaches. Current rate: 7.25%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2015-09-29: Larger 50 bps cut to 6.75%. CPI below 4%, space for easing created. Current rate: 6.75%. Change: -50 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2016-04-05: Cut to 6.50%. MPC framework established. Urjit Patel appointed Governor. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2017-08-02: Rate at 6.00%. Post-demonetization excess liquidity, below-target CPI. Current rate: 6.0%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2018-06-06: First hike in 4 years to 6.25%. Oil prices rising, INR under pressure. Current rate: 6.25%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2018-08-01: Rate at 6.50%. CPI at 5%, risk of overshooting target. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2019-02-07: Cut to 6.25%. Stance changed to neutral. Shaktikanta Das new Governor. Current rate: 6.25%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2019-04-04: Cut to 6.00%. Growth slowdown, CPI below 3%. Current rate: 6.0%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2019-06-06: Rate at 5.75%. Below 5% CPI, growth dipping below 6%. Current rate: 5.75%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2019-08-07: Unconventional 35 bps cut to 5.40%. RBI supports fiscal stimulus. Current rate: 5.4%. Change: -35 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2019-10-04: Cut to 5.15%. Slowest growth in 6 years at 4.5% GDP. Current rate: 5.15%. Change: -25 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2020-03-27: Emergency 75 bps cut to 4.40%. COVID-19 pandemic declared, lockdown. Current rate: 4.4%. Change: -75 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2020-05-22: Cut to 4.00%. Sustained COVID-19 impact, output contraction. Current rate: 4.0%. Change: -40 bps cut.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2022-05-04: Emergency off-cycle hike to 4.40%. Inflation above 7%, Ukraine war impact. Current rate: 4.4%. Change: +40 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2022-06-08: Rate at 4.90%. Aggressive normalization cycle begins. Current rate: 4.9%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2022-08-05: Hike to 5.40%. CPI at 7%+, coordinated global tightening. Current rate: 5.4%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2022-09-30: Rate at 5.90%. Supply-side inflation persistent. Current rate: 5.9%. Change: +50 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2022-12-07: Rate raised to 6.25%. Inflation gradually declining from peak. Current rate: 6.25%. Change: +35 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2023-02-08: Rate at 6.50%. Pause signaled ahead. CPI trending down. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: +25 bps hike.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2023-04-06: MPC holds at 6.50%. Withdrawal of accommodation stance maintained. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2024-02-08: Rate held at 6.50% for 6th consecutive meeting. Inflation durable but growth strong. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2024-10-09: Rate unchanged at 6.50%. Stance changed to neutral from withdrawal of accommodation. Current rate: 6.5%. Change: No change.

source: Reserve Bank of India MPC Minutes
text: RBI Repo Rate Decision – 2024-12-06: First cut since 2020. Rate lowered to 6.25%. Inflation below 5%, growth resilient. Current rate: 6.25%. Change: -25 bps cut.
